nasb.text: “Therefore do not pray for this people, nor lift up a cry or prayer for them; for I will not listen when they call to Me because of their disaster.

esv.text: “Therefore do not pray for this people, or lift up a cry or prayer on their behalf, for I will not listen when they call to me in the time of their trouble.

cnv.text: “至於你，不要為這人民祈禱，不要為他們呼求禱告，因為他們遭難向我呼求的時候，我必不聽他們。

ccb.text: “因此，耶利米啊，你不要为这些人祈祷，不要为他们呼求祷告，因为他们遭难时向我呼求，我必不理会他们。
